title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Integration Workshop
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a production skill and MCP integration package while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
